executives.name: Murray John
executives.background: Mr. John is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the resource sector. He was formerly the President and CEO of Dundee Resources Limited and served as a director of several mining companies including Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd. and Alamos Gold Inc.
